title: Automated Conveyor System
description: A fully automated conveyor belt system with PLC control, sensor integration, and variable speed control for industrial packaging applications.

title: Smart Home IoT Hub
description: Centralized IoT control system for home automation featuring temperature monitoring, lighting control, and security integration via mobile app.

title: Defect Detection Vision System
description: Machine vision system using OpenCV and Python for real-time quality inspection and defect detection in manufacturing lines.
